title: Implement landlord onboarding save + set onboarding_complete
description: On 'Go to my listings' in landlord onboarding, update the display_name on profiles and mark onboarding_complete = true.
acceptance_criteria: Clicking button updates profiles: display_name = input value, onboarding_complete = true

steps.description: Wire Go to my listings button
steps.details: document.getElementById('go-to-listings').addEventListener('click', async () => { goBtn.disabled = true; goBtn.textContent = 'Saving…'; const { data: { session } } = await supabase.auth.getSession(); const displayName = document.getElementById('display-name').value.trim(); const { error } = await supabase.from('profiles').update({ display_name: displayName, onboarding_complete: true }).eq('id', session.user.id); if (error) { showError(error.message); goBtn.disabled = false; goBtn.textContent = 'Go to my listings'; return; } window.location.href = '/listings'; });
